words.sentence: I go to the store with my mother.
words.sentence_ja: 私は母と一緒に店に行きます。

words.sentence: She plays the piano very well.
words.sentence_ja: 彼女はピアノをとても上手に弾きます。

words.sentence: Kaya wears a beautiful red dress.
words.sentence_ja: カヤは美しい赤いドレスを着ています。

words.sentence: Put on your coat. It is cold outside.
words.sentence_ja: コートを着てください。外は寒いです。

words.sentence: My father works at the hospital.
words.sentence_ja: 私の父は病院で働いています。

words.sentence: I always eat breakfast before school.
words.sentence_ja: 私はいつも学校の前に朝食を食べます。

words.sentence: I need a pencil for the test.
words.sentence_ja: テストにえんぴつが必要です。

words.sentence: Look at the calendar. Today is Monday.
words.sentence_ja: カレンダーを見てください。今日は月曜日です。

words.sentence: We can buy medicine at the pharmacy.
words.sentence_ja: 薬局で薬を買うことができます。

words.sentence: She has two tickets for the movie.
words.sentence_ja: 彼女は映画のチケットを2枚持っています。

words.sentence: The train station is near my school.
words.sentence_ja: 電車の駅は私の学校の近くにあります。

words.sentence: This is an awesome game! I love it.
words.sentence_ja: これはすごいゲームです！大好きです。

words.japanese: 興奮した・わくわくした
words.sentence: Kaya is very excited about her new school.
words.sentence_ja: カヤは新しい学校についてとてもわくわくしています。

words.sentence: The clown at the circus is very funny.
words.sentence_ja: サーカスのピエロはとてもおかしいです。

words.sentence: The game is over. Our team won!
words.sentence_ja: ゲームは終わりました。私たちのチームが勝ちました！

words.sentence: This math problem is difficult for me.
words.sentence_ja: この数学の問題は私には難しいです。

story.title: Kaya's First Day
sentences: Kaya is very excited about her first day at the new school.
She always wakes up early and puts on her favorite dress and coat.
Her mother says, "You look awesome today, Kaya!"
Kaya checks the calendar — it is Monday, the first day of April.
She takes her pencil and bag, then walks to the station.
Near the station, there is a store and a pharmacy.
At school, her new teacher gives tickets for a circus show.
"This is difficult to believe!" Kaya says with a big smile.
At the circus, a funny clown jumps over a tall box.
When the show is over, Kaya thinks, "This is the best day!"
